page.title: Festival Calendar of the Acrobat Troupe

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[de:Festkalender der Akrobatentruppe]]
The ''''''Festival Calendar of the Acrobat Troupe'''''' provides an overview of the '''{{ill|Ancient Egyptian festivals|de|Feste und Brauchtum (Altägypten)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ancient Egyptian festivals|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}}''' celebrated in the '''35th regnal year''' of '''{{ill|Amenemhat III|en|Amenemhat III|qid=Q19244|lt=Amenemhat III|1=Amenemhat III}}''', featuring performances by an '''acrobatic troupe'''. == '''Background''' == [[File:Earthshine 2005-09-01.jpg|thumb|upright=0.6|Old Moon crescent ('''Altlicht-Mondsichel''')]] The festival list records '''processions''' that were attended by the '''acrobat troupe''' as part of '''public performances''', often incorporating '''dance-like ceremonies'''. Other festivals that did not involve '''acrobatics''' were not included in this particular record. The festival '''dates''' were determined based on either the '''{{ill|Egyptian calendar|en|Egyptian calendar|qid=Q254101|lt=Civil Egyptian calendar|1=Egyptian calendar}}''' or the '''{{ill|Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|1=Ancient Egyptian Lunar Calendar|1=Ancient Egyptian Lunar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|13=User:Immanuelle/Ancient Egyptian Lunar Calendar|qid=Q1944246}}'''. However, for '''lunar calendar festivals''', the '''exact date''' was proclaimed only '''after the sighting of the New Moon''', with priests announcing the '''finalized festival date'''. In the lunar calendar, the festival '''days''' were counted from the '''last visible waning crescent (Altlicht)'''. Once the date was confirmed, it was '''recorded in the administrative calendar''' and later '''documented in the temple archives'''. == '''Festival List''' == {| class="wikitable" style="width: 100%; border: 2px solid gray;" |- {{Egyptology TblHighlight}} ! width="30%" | Festival Name ! width="25%" | '''Civil Calendar''' ! width="25%" | '''Lunar Calendar''' ! width="20%" | '''Festival Location''' |- | {{ill|New Year's Festival (Ancient Egypt)|de|Neujahrsfest (Altes Ägypten)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/New Year's Festival (Ancient Egypt)|qid=Q1980738|1=New Year's Festival (Ancient Egypt)}} | {{ill|Season of the Inundation|en|Season of the Inundation|qid=Q770568|lt=Achet|1=Season of the Inundation}} 1st '''Achet I''' | | ??? |- | {{ill|Menchet Festival|de|Menchet-Fest|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Menchet Festival|qid=Q1920275|1=Menchet Festival}} | | '''3rd Achet II''' | {{ill|El Lahun|en|El Lahun|qid=Q56924|lt=El-Lahun|1=El Lahun}} |- | {{ill|Burnt Offering Bowls|de|Brandopferschalen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Burnt Offering Bowls|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}} | | '''15th Achet III''' | ??? |- | {{ill|Sokar Festival|de|Sokar-Fest|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sokar Festival|qid=Q2298046|1=Sokar Festival}} | '''1st Achet IV''' | | ??? |- | {{ill|Nehebkau Festival|de|Neheb-kau-Fest|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nehebkau Festival|qid=Q1974477|1=Nehebkau Festival}} (Beautiful Festival of the Coronation) | '''1st Peret I – 2nd Peret I''' | | {{ill|Karnak|de|Karnak|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Karnak|qid=Q189392|1=Ipet-Sut}} |- | {{ill|Dragging of Sokar|de|Ziehen des Sokar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dragging of Sokar|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}} | | '''1st Peret II''' | ??? |- | {{ill|Journey on Land|de|Fahrt auf dem Land|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Journey on Land|qid=Q1392689|1=Journey on Land}} | | '''8th Peret III''' | ??? |- | {{ill|Full Moon Festival|de|Vollmondfest|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Full Moon Festival|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}} | | '''15th Schemu I''' | ??? |- | {{ill|Heriu-renpet|de|Heriu-renpet|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heriu-renpet|qid=Q1610070|1=Heriu-renpet}} | '''1st – 5th Epagomenal Days (Schalttage)''' | | ??? |- |} == '''See Also''' == * '''{{ill|Festival Calendar of Thutmose III|de|Festkalender Thutmosis III.|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Festival Calendar of Thutmose III|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}}''' * '''{{ill|Festival Calendar of Medinet Habu|de|Festkalender Medinet Habu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Festival Calendar of Medinet Habu|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}}''' * '''{{ill|Festival Calendar of Ramesses III|de|Festkalender Ramses III.|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Festival Calendar of Ramesses III|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work|comment=no wikipedias work}}''' == '''Further Reading''' == * '''Agnes-Sophia Griffith''': ''Catalogue of Egyptian Antiquities of the XII and XVIII Dynasties from Kahun, Illahun and Gurob''. London, 1910. * '''Richard-Anthony Parker''': ''The Calendars of Ancient Egypt''. Chicago Press, Chicago, 1950. * '''Siegfried Schott''': ''Altägyptische Festdaten''. Verlag der Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur, Mainz/Wiesbaden, 1950.
{{translated page|de|Festkalender der Akrobatentruppe|version=201486004|comment=Imported full de history}}
